name: LoadingOverlay
searchText: loadingoverlay an overlay with centered loader @mantine/core /core/loading-overlay loaderprops onenter onentered onexit onexited overlayprops transitionprops visible zindex

props.name: overlayProps
props.description: Props passed down to Overlay component. Use to customizing blur, opacity, color and other properties.

props.name: transitionProps
props.description: Props passed down to Transition component. Set duration to create custom transition or override default transition.

props.name: visible
props.description: Controls overlay visibility. Typically used with state (useState, useDisclosure).

props.name: zIndex
props.description: Controls z-index of both the overlay and loader. The loader receives z-index + 1.
